_meta.consensusLibraries: PoSy Core v3.x + Aegis Crypto Suite
_meta.networking: libp2p v0.53+, QUIC support, dynamic peer-discovery

VPN Hub.description: Central VPN hub that manages the WireGuard mesh network connecting all devnet machines (devnet-only infrastructure, not in mainnet whitepaper)

functionality.primary: Manages WireGuard VPN mesh topology for the devnet
tasks: Maintain peer configuration for all machines
Distribute WireGuard public keys across network
Handle NAT traversal and endpoint updates
Monitor tunnel health and latency between peers
Auto-configure new machines joining the VPN

Validator.description: Executes PoSy consensus rounds, proposes and signs blocks. Must maintain >= 99.5% uptime. Runs full chain.

functionality.primary: Executes PoSy consensus rounds, proposes and signs blocks
tasks: Participate in cooperative BFT consensus rounds
Propose and sign new blocks in PoSy rotation
Validate and attest to blocks from other validators
Maintain full chain state with RocksDB/LMDB
Process incoming transactions from the mempool
Earn staking rewards through Synergy Score contributions
Participate in committee rotation every epoch (12h default)

Committee.description: Participates in weighted-committee voting and Synergy-Score updates. Rotates every epoch; receives performance bonuses.

functionality.primary: Participates in weighted-committee voting and Synergy-Score updates
tasks: Join epoch-based committee rotations (12h default epoch)
Vote on block proposals with weighted committee authority
Update and propagate Synergy Score calculations
Attest to finalized blocks for deterministic finality
Participate in leader election for block proposal
Receive performance bonuses for uptime and contribution quality

Archive Validator.description: Stores full historical ledger, reconstructs Merkle proofs. Not required for consensus; supports explorers and analytics.

functionality.primary: Stores full historical ledger and reconstructs Merkle proofs
tasks: Store complete historical state from genesis including pruned data
Reconstruct Merkle proofs for any historical state
Serve historical state queries at any block height
Generate and distribute state snapshots every 512 blocks (~30 min)
Support blockchain explorers and analytics platforms
Provide audit trail data for compliance queries

Audit Validator.description: Runs replicated consensus for security verification. Cross-checks signatures and QCs for fraud detection.

functionality.primary: Runs replicated consensus for security verification and fraud detection
tasks: Run replicated consensus independently to verify block validity
Cross-check signatures and Quorum Certificates (QCs) for fraud
Perform periodic Merkle root verification of global state
Audit validator reward distributions for correctness
Generate audit reports with cryptographic proofs
Alert Security Council nodes of detected inconsistencies

Relayer.description: Executes SXCP cross-chain signatures via Aegis PQC threshold cryptography. Must run full light-clients for ETH, SOL, BTC etc.

functionality.primary: Executes SXCP cross-chain signatures via Aegis PQC threshold cryptography
tasks: Execute cross-chain signatures using Aegis PQC threshold crypto (Dilithium-3 + ML-KEM)
Run full light-clients for connected chains (ETH, SOL, BTC, etc.)
Relay finalized state proofs between Synergy and external networks
Collect relay fees for cross-chain message delivery
Maintain connection state with external chain RPCs
Participate in relayer cluster rotation (10-15 nodes per connected chain)

Witness.description: Observes external-chain events and submits attestations to the SXCP Validator contract. Provides verified proofs (SPV/ZK) for cross-chain deposits or swaps.

functionality.primary: Observes external-chain events and submits attestations to SXCP Validator contract
tasks: Monitor connected chains for cross-chain deposit and swap events
Submit attestations to SXCP Validator smart contract
Generate verified proofs (SPV/ZK) for deposits and swaps
Participate in SXCP witness registry with uptime reputation score
Participate in threshold signing for cross-chain proofs
Maintain witness uptime for registry reputation scoring

Oracle.description: Fetches off-chain data feeds (price, time, identity). Uses authenticated data channels; bonded and slashable.

functionality.primary: Fetches off-chain data feeds (price, time, identity) via authenticated data channels
tasks: Fetch and aggregate external price data from multiple authenticated sources
Provide time and identity oracle feeds for smart contracts
Publish signed data attestations on-chain
Maintain data freshness within configurable thresholds
Participate in multi-oracle consensus for data integrity
Subject to slashing for providing fraudulent data

UMA Coordinator.description: Manages Universal Meta-Address mapping and key-share coordination. Performs threshold-key refresh and rotation events.

functionality.primary: Manages Universal Meta-Address mapping and key-share coordination
tasks: Manage UMA (Universal Meta-Address) mapping across chains
Coordinate key-share distribution among SXCP relay participants
Perform threshold-key refresh and rotation events per epoch
Maintain UMA registry for cross-chain address resolution
Coordinate attestation challenges and dispute resolution
Provide identity lookups for other node types across the SXCP

Cross-Chain Verifier.description: Validates foreign-chain proofs (e.g., zk-proofs, Merkle-roots). Verifies SXCP proof bundles asynchronously from PoSy rounds.

functionality.primary: Validates foreign-chain proofs (zk-proofs, Merkle-roots) for SXCP
tasks: Validate foreign-chain zk-proofs and Merkle-root proofs
Verify SXCP proof bundles asynchronously (decoupled from PoSy rounds)
Generate and sign attestations for verified cross-chain state
Maintain light client state for connected chains
Use GPU-accelerated ZK proof verification when available
Report verification failures to Security Council and relay operators

Compute.description: Executes decentralized off-chain tasks (AI training, simulations, rendering). Connects to AIVM via task-registry contracts; rewarded per task.

functionality.primary: Executes decentralized off-chain tasks (AI training, simulations, rendering) via AIVM
tasks: Execute AIVM off-chain compute tasks (AI training, simulations, rendering)
Connect to task-registry contracts for job assignment and reward
Execute SynQ smart contract transactions in WASM runtime
Manage contract state storage and retrieval
Estimate gas costs for contract execution
Provide deterministic execution results for consensus verification

AI Inference.description: Runs lightweight inference for Synergy AI VM agents and oracle analytics. Handles validator behavior analysis, anomaly detection.

functionality.primary: Runs lightweight inference for Synergy AIVM agents and oracle analytics
tasks: Run inference for Synergy AI VM agents on-demand
Analyze validator behavior patterns for anomaly detection
Provide oracle analytics and data quality scoring
Predict validator churn and staking behavior
Detect transaction patterns indicating fraud or abuse
Generate network health scores and predictive alerts

PQC Crypto.description: Benchmarks and provides quantum-safe key generation, KEM, signature verification. Runs Aegis libraries (ML-KEM, SLH-DSA, FN-DSA modules).

functionality.primary: Provides quantum-safe key generation, KEM, and signature verification via Aegis PQC suite
tasks: Generate ML-KEM-512 keypairs for key encapsulation
Sign and verify messages using Dilithium-3 signatures
Run SLH-DSA (stateless hash-based) signature operations
Execute FN-DSA (Falcon-based) signature operations
Benchmark PQC algorithm performance for network optimization
Manage epoch-scoped key lifecycles and rotation

Data Availability.description: Stores erasure-coded shards of blocks for DA verification. Ensures MEV integrity and data availability proofs for PoSy epochs.

functionality.primary: Stores erasure-coded shards and provides DA verification for PoSy epochs
tasks: Store erasure-coded shards of block data
Respond to data availability sampling queries from validators
Generate availability proofs for committed data
Ensure MEV integrity through DA verification proofs
Garbage-collect expired blob data after retention period
Serve block shard data to new nodes during chain sync

Governance Auditor.description: Verifies DAO proposals, performs Synergy Score audits, ensures rule compliance. Weighted 10% governance influence; logs immutable audit trails.

functionality.primary: Verifies DAO proposals, performs Synergy Score audits, ensures rule compliance
tasks: Verify DAO proposal validity and rule compliance
Perform Synergy Score audits for validator performance
Log immutable audit trails for all governance actions
Reconcile DAO state every epoch (per operational standards)
Validate protocol upgrade bytecode before activation
Exercise 10% weighted governance influence on audited proposals

Treasury Controller.description: Executes approved fund transfers from DAO treasury smart contracts. Requires 5-of-7 multi-sig among controllers.

functionality.primary: Executes approved fund transfers from DAO treasury via 5-of-7 multi-sig
tasks: Execute approved fund transfers from DAO treasury contracts
Enforce 5-of-7 multi-sig requirement for all disbursements
Track treasury balance, allocations, and fund movements
Process approved disbursement proposals from governance
Generate treasury reports for governance visibility
Integrate with HSM for secure key storage (recommended)

Security Council.description: Holds emergency multi-sig keys to pause or rollback the network. 5-of-7 threshold; triggers Paused Mode per rollback policy.

functionality.primary: Holds emergency multi-sig keys to pause or rollback the network (5-of-7 threshold)
tasks: Hold emergency multi-sig keys for network pause/rollback
Trigger Paused Mode per Emergency Governance Rollback Policy section 3
Monitor network for security threats and anomalies
Coordinate incident response across all node classes
Execute emergency governance actions with 5-of-7 threshold
Undergo monthly code integrity checks (per operational standards)

RPC Gateway.description: Provides public JSON-RPC & WebSocket access. Mirrors main chain; rate-limited and DDoS-protected.

functionality.primary: Provides public JSON-RPC & WebSocket access with DDoS protection
tasks: Serve public JSON-RPC and WebSocket API endpoints
Mirror main chain state for read-only queries
Enforce per-IP and per-key rate limiting
Protect against DDoS attacks with traffic filtering
Cache frequently-requested data (block headers, chain state)
Serve WebSocket subscriptions for real-time updates

Indexer.description: Indexes blocks, transactions, events for Synergy Explorer frontend. Hosts searchable APIs and analytics endpoints.

functionality.primary: Indexes blocks, transactions, events for Synergy Explorer frontend
tasks: Index all blocks, transactions, and events in real-time
Host searchable APIs for address, tx hash, block number queries
Serve analytics endpoints (TPS, gas usage, active addresses)
Provide backend data for Synergy Explorer frontend
Maintain PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch indices
Maintain historical data for explorer and dashboard views

Observer.description: Verifies headers only; designed for wallets and mobile devices. Provides fast read-only verification without full sync.

functionality.primary: Verifies headers only; provides fast read-only verification for wallets and light clients
tasks: Verify block headers without full chain sync
Provide fast read-only state verification for wallets
Support mobile device and light client connections
Serve read-only RPC queries with header-level verification
Monitor network health and validator participation

GPU Node.description: GPU-accelerated compute node supporting Compute and AI Inference nodes. Devnet infrastructure node (supplements Class III nodes).

functionality.primary: Provides GPU-accelerated compute for Compute and AI Inference nodes
tasks: Execute GPU-parallel ZK proof generation
Run batched cryptographic verification operations
Provide GPU compute resources for AI Inference nodes
Accelerate PQC key generation operations
Report GPU utilization and available compute capacity
